title: UAE: Lootah Biofuels Launches Sustainable Aviation Fuel in UAE Ahead of Dubai Airshow 2025
content:
Lootah Biofuels, a Dubai-based clean energy firm, has launched Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) in the UAE, becoming one of the nationâ€™s first local suppliers of low-carbon aviation fuel. The initiative supports the UAEâ€™s Net Zero 2050 vision and will be showcased at the Dubai Airshow 2025, where Lootah will join global leaders on sustainability panels and sponsor the Aviation & Space Sustainability 2050 Conference.

The SAF, produced from used cooking oil and waste-derived fats, meets ASTM D7566-24 and ICAO CORSIA standards. It reduces greenhouse gas emissions by up to 80%, can be blended up to 50% with Jet A-1 fuel, and delivers cleaner combustion with low sulfur and aromatic content.

Initially, SAF supplies will be imported from international partners, with feasibility studies for a UAE-based production facility already completed. Lootahâ€™s three-phase roadmap includes short-term imports, medium-term local production, and long-term full-scale manufacturing to cut imports, enhance energy security, and create green jobs. This move positions the UAE as a regional hub for sustainable aviation fuel.
author: Analysts Account
